administrator_login.description: The login username for the database administrator.

administrator_password.description: The password for the database administrator.

auto_grow_enabled.description: Indicates if auto-grow is enabled for storage.

create_mode.description: Specifies the mode for creating the server.

delegated_subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet delegated to the server.

geo_redundant_backup_enabled.description: Indicates if geo-redundant backup is enabled.

name.description: The name of the PostgreSQL flexible server.

point_in_time_restore_time_in_utc.description: The UTC time to restore the server to.

postgresql_version.description: The version of the postgresql server.

private_dns_zone_id.description: The ID of the private DNS zone associated with the server.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Indicates if public network access is enabled.

replication_role.description: The replication role of the server.

source_server_id.description: The ID of the source server for replication.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the server.

zone.description: The availability zone for the server.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
